docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,145.00 FILED BY TESFAI, KIFLAI AS TO DEFENDANT MAINTENANCE SYSTEM MANAGEMENT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-25-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TESFAI, KIFLAI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAINTENANCE SYSTEM MANAGEMENT $2,145.00 PRINCIPAL, $46.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,191.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
